flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at The University of Findlay fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (47.2% → 36.8%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at The University of Findlay fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (87.9% → 73.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at The University of Findlay rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.2k → $41.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The University of Findlay rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.2k → $41.2k).
